info.title: FabGreat API
info.description:
Flesh and Blood TCG collection tracker API.

Browse the full card catalog (92 sets, 4 200+ cards, 14 000+ printings), track ownership
down to foiling and edition, and manage saved wishlist filters.

## Authentication

Most catalog endpoints are public. Collection and wishlist endpoints require a **Bearer**
token obtained from `POST /auth/token` (login) or `POST /auth/register`.

Refresh tokens are opaque and stored server-side. Call `POST /auth/refresh` to rotate
without re-entering credentials, and `POST /auth/logout` to revoke.

## Pagination

Paginated endpoints accept `page` (1-based) and `page_size` (max 100) query parameters
and return `{ items, total, page, page_size }`.

## Foiling codes

| Code | Meaning |
|------|---------|
| S | Standard (non-foil) |
| R | Rainbow foil |
| C | Cold foil |
| G | Gold Cold foil |

## Edition codes

| Code | Meaning |
|------|---------|
| A | Alpha |
| F | First Edition |
| U | Unlimited |
| N | No specified edition |

post.description: Create a new user account and return a fresh access token and refresh token.

409.description: A user with that email address already exists.

post.description: Authenticate with email and password using the OAuth2 password flow. Returns a short-lived access token and a long-lived refresh token.
Exchange a valid refresh token for a new access token. The refresh token itself is reused (not rotated) unless it has expired or been revoked.

401.description: Refresh token is invalid, expired, or has been revoked.

post.description: Revoke the supplied refresh token. The access token will continue to work until it expires naturally.

get.description: Return the profile of the currently authenticated user.

Return all sets with their total printing count. When authenticated, each set also includes the number of distinct printings the user owns (`owned_count`). Unauthenticated requests receive `owned_count: null`.
Return a paginated list of printings belonging to the given set, with optional filters.

get.description: Return full detail for a single card, including all printings across every set and edition.

Cross-set printing search with full filter support. Unlike `GET /sets/{id}/printings`, this endpoint is not scoped to a single set and can locate a specific foiling or edition of a card regardless of which set it appears in.

get.description: Return all printings the authenticated user owns, with full card and set detail. Use `set_id` to scope the results to a single set — useful for computing per-set completion.

parameters.name: set_id

schema.description: Scope results to a specific set.
schema.title: Set Id

parameters.description: Scope results to a specific set.

schema.title: Response Get Summary Collection Summary Get

post.description: Set an exact quantity for a single printing. Creates the ownership record if it does not exist. Setting `qty` to 0 removes the printing from the collection entirely.
Apply multiple collection actions atomically. All printing IDs are validated before any change is made — if any ID is invalid the entire request is rejected with 404.

schema.title: Response Bulk Apply Collection Bulk Post

404.description: One or more printing IDs were not found.

get.description: Return a paginated list of printings that exist in the catalog but are not yet owned by the authenticated user. Supports the same filters as the set printings endpoint. Typically used to build a want list or identify collection gaps.

get.description: Return all wishlists belonging to the authenticated user, ordered by creation date.

post.description: Save a named filter as a wishlist. Free-tier users may only have **one** wishlist at a time. Delete the existing wishlist before creating a new one.

402.description: Free-tier limit reached — delete the existing wishlist first.

delete.description: Permanently delete a wishlist. This frees the slot so a new wishlist can be created.

404.description: Wishlist not found or belongs to a different user.

printing_id.title: Printing Id
printing_id.description: ID of the printing to act on.

action.description: Action to perform: 'set_qty' sets an exact quantity (requires qty); 'increment' adds 1 to the current quantity; 'mark_playset' sets quantity to 3; 'clear' removes the printing from the collection.

qty.title: Qty
qty.description: Required when action is 'set_qty'. Ignored for all other actions.

items.title: Items
items.description: List of actions to apply atomically. All printing IDs must exist or the entire request is rejected.

hero_class.title: Hero Class
hero_class.description: Hero class this card belongs to (e.g. 'Ninja', 'Wizard'). Null for generic cards.

talent.title: Talent
talent.description: Talent affinity (e.g. 'Shadow', 'Light'). Null if the card has no talent.

pitch.title: Pitch
pitch.description: Pitch value (0–3). Null for cards that cannot be pitched.

qty.title: Qty
qty.description: Resulting quantity after the operation. Null means the row was deleted (qty reached 0).

ItemResult.title: ItemResult
ItemResult.description: Result of a single collection mutation. qty=None means the row was deleted.

printing.description: Full printing detail including card and set information.

qty.title: Qty
qty.description: Number of copies owned. Always >= 1 (rows with qty=0 are deleted).

OwnedPrintingOut.title: OwnedPrintingOut
OwnedPrintingOut.description: An owned printing with full card/set detail and qty.

total.title: Total
total.description: Total number of cards matching the current filters.

total.title: Total
total.description: Total number of printings matching the current filters.

edition.title: Edition
edition.description: Edition code: A=Alpha, F=First, U=Unlimited, N=No specified edition.

foiling.title: Foiling
foiling.description: Foiling code: S=Standard, R=Rainbow, C=Cold, G=Gold Cold.

rarity.title: Rarity
rarity.description: Rarity code: C=Common, R=Rare, M=Majestic, L=Legendary, F=Fabled, T=Token, P=Promo.

artists.title: Artists
artists.description: List of artist names credited on this printing.

art_variations.title: Art Variations
art_variations.description: List of art variation identifiers, if the card has alternate art in the same printing.

image_url.title: Image Url
image_url.description: URL to the card image for this specific printing, if available.

tcgplayer_product_id.title: Tcgplayer Product Id
tcgplayer_product_id.description: TCGplayer product ID for this printing, if available.

tcgplayer_url.title: Tcgplayer Url
tcgplayer_url.description: Direct TCGplayer listing URL for this printing, if available.

card.description: The card this printing belongs to.

set.description: The set this printing belongs to.

PrintingWithCard.title: PrintingWithCard
PrintingWithCard.description: Printing with nested card and set info — used in list/search endpoints.

refresh_token.title: Refresh Token
refresh_token.description: Opaque refresh token previously issued by this API.

image_url.title: Image Url
image_url.description: URL to the set's logo or key art, if available.

printing_count.title: Printing Count
printing_count.description: Total number of distinct printings (card × edition × foiling) in this set.

owned_count.title: Owned Count
owned_count.description: Number of those printings the authenticated user owns at least one copy of. Null when the request is unauthenticated.

SetSummary.title: SetSummary
SetSummary.description: Set with aggregate counts; owned_count is None when unauthenticated.

access_token.title: Access Token
access_token.description: Short-lived JWT (15 min). Send as 'Authorization: Bearer <token>'.

refresh_token.title: Refresh Token
refresh_token.description: Opaque long-lived token. Use with POST /auth/refresh to obtain a new access token.

printing_id.title: Printing Id
printing_id.description: ID of the printing to update.

qty.title: Qty
qty.description: Desired quantity. Set to 0 to remove the printing from the collection.

is_active.title: Is Active
is_active.description: False if the account has been disabled by an administrator.

is_admin.title: Is Admin
is_admin.description: True if the user has administrative privileges.

created_at.title: Created At
created_at.description: UTC timestamp when the account was created.

filter_json.description: Filter criteria that define which missing printings this wishlist tracks.

card_id.title: Card Id
card_id.description: Scope to printings of a specific card.

set_id.title: Set Id
set_id.description: Scope to printings in a specific set.

edition.title: Edition
edition.description: Edition code: A=Alpha, F=First, U=Unlimited, N=No specified edition.

foiling.title: Foiling
foiling.description: Foiling code: S=Standard, R=Rainbow, C=Cold, G=Gold Cold.

rarity.title: Rarity
rarity.description: Exact rarity code: C=Common, R=Rare, M=Majestic, L=Legendary, F=Fabled, T=Token, P=Promo.

artists.title: Artists
artists.description: Substring match against the artists array (case-insensitive).

created_at.title: Created At
created_at.description: UTC timestamp when the wishlist was created.

updated_at.title: Updated At
updated_at.description: UTC timestamp of the last update.
